title: LIP01 - Items: multiple
code:
<gds-list>
  <gds-list-item-pattern-01 id="row1"></gds-list-item-pattern-01>
  <gds-list-item-pattern-01 id="row2"></gds-list-item-pattern-01>
</gds-list>

<script>
  document.getElementById('row1').items = [
    { label: 'Account', value: '1234 5678 9012' },
    { label: 'Balance', value: '12 345,00 SEK' },
    { label: 'Status', value: 'Active' },
  ]

  document.getElementById('row2').items = [
    { label: 'Account', value: '1234 5678 9012' },
    { value: '0' },
  ]
</script>
